# Output description  {.unnumbered #part-Out}

This part provides a description of "all" the objects (time series, diagnostics...) which can be generated with JDemetra+ algorithms, as well means of generating them (with R packages, Graphical User Interface, Plug-ins, Cruncher...)



<!-- In this part:  -->

<!-- -   [Forecasting and nowcasting examples](#u-now) -->

<!-- -   [Several ways for detecing outliers](#u-out) -->

<!-- -   [Refreshing a series or workspace](#u-refresh) -->
